violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Microwave interiors not properly maintained.

SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single use cups noted being stored on the floor.

VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Exhaust hood and filters noted need cleaning. One filter is missing above the grill.

REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage and recyclables containers noted not covered with a tight fitting lids.
